hero_title_accent: Designed for Regulated Digital Asset Firms
hero_subtitle: SFTY connects compliance checks, provider outputs, policies and workflows into one auditable system supporting role-based access, evidence integrity and institutional readiness.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling

problem_title: Compliance slows when systems stay disconnected
problem_description: Enterprise compliance teams struggle to maintain a consistent operating view when KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening outputs remain separated across multiple providers. This fragmentation leads to manual work, weak audit evidence and challenges in preparing cohesive bank due diligence and regulatory reviews.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY integrates KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening data into a unified compliance operating layer that centralizes case management, audit evidence and regulatory reporting for institutional teams.
workflow_title: From provider outputs to compliance evidence
workflow_description: SFTY connects provider checks with internal rules, routes reviews, creates cases, records decisions and preserves evidence for audit-ready compliance workflows.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Not another dashboard. One compliance layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY provides a provider-neutral compliance layer that connects outputs into audit-ready workflows, decisions, evidence, and reporting for enterprise-grade integration and control.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs requiring audit-ready evidence, bank due diligence and provider orchestration within secure, permissioned environments for scalable enterprise deployment.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for enterprise compliance?
faq_1_answer: SFTY serves as a compliance control layer for enterprises, connecting multiple provider outputs into connected workflows, cases, evidence and reporting across digital asset compliance operations.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY integrate with compliance workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY structures fragmented provider outputs into operational workflows, routing reviews, cases and decisions while aligning them with internal rules and regulatory requirements for enterprise teams.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves decision logs, case history and supporting evidence, maintaining traceability and audit readiness without altering source data or provider records.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY support secure enterprise deployment?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY supports role-based access, audit logs, configurable permissions and controlled deployment suited for regulated enterprise environments.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace existing compliance providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace KYC, KYB, KYT or Travel Rule providers but connects their outputs into a coordinated compliance operating layer.
final_title: Review enterprise compliance integration with SFTY
final_description: See how SFTY supports role-based access, audit-ready evidence and scalable workflows for regulated digital asset firms.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
